title: EB1911 article record
description: One line of articles.jsonl — a single Encyclopædia Britannica (1911) article.

id.description: Stable identifier (volume-page-slug-TITLE), used as the node id in every graph.

page_start.description: First printed page of the article.

categories.description: Topic-node ids from topics.json that this article is filed under (may be empty).

sections.description: In-article headings, in document order — natural sub-article chunk boundaries.

contributors.description: Scholars credited with the article; full bios are in contributors.json, keyed by initials.

images.description: Image REFERENCES (filenames), not binaries; fetch from britannica11.org as needed.

xrefs.description: Resolved internal cross-references; the same edges are in xref_edges.jsonl.

display.description: Link text as it appears in the prose.

markdown.description: The article body as GitHub-Flavored Markdown: headings, emphasis, tables, math ($…$), [links](id), and image references. Presentation (type sizes, small-caps, centering) is shed.
